Learning Application and Research Center

International Accreditations and Rankings Unit

MENU

The 'International Accreditations and Rankings Unit' (IA&R) was established within the Learning Application and Research Centre to manage and enhance the performance of our university in the world of higher education.

The unit's operations are predicated on the identification of the present status of international accreditations and rankings, as well as the development of strategies to improve these rankings. In this context, IA&R's primary responsibilities include the systematic and effective execution of the ranking application process, as well as the provision of essential feedback to pertinent academic/administrative units to facilitate the implementation of strategies that are designed to enhance international accreditations and rankings.

The evaluation of internationalisation performance is conducted by analysing the results obtained from ranking organisations and assessing the progress made towards established objectives. The results obtained are tangible indicators of international performance.
